title: After the Queen Elizabeth II Cup: The Way of Magic

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Showcasing her overwhelming strength, Sweep
Tosho comes in first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though disappointed in their defeat, Kawakami
Princess and the others vow to take Sweep Tosho
on again. Pleased to hear this, Sweep Tosho
smiles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that, alongside her apprentices, she's
going to fill the world with even more excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Daiwa Scarlet and Vodka fall under
her spell from up in the stands. They, too, are left
feeling determined to forge a new future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the little witch continues along her new
path with her apprentices. It won't be long before
she's casting a brand-new spell on the world with
a new generation of Umamusume.
